title: The Island’s Secrets Push Forward
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Unknown person #7, Franky, Unknown person #8, Nami, Robin, Unknown person #9 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What Happened?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Seems like they did it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fires in the school and library have all been extinguished!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Even calamities..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: are ultimately just clumps of energy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Franky!! Take this for a whirl!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold up!! This bottle looks like it's gonna burst!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yup!! I call it...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Super vega-Cola!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your internal structure is truly magnificently designed! You're at least on par with the PacificTA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I was shocked to learn you managed to run yourself on plain old cola!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Listen good now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: YOUR FUEL IS YOUR PASSION!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: When you use this stuff, your power...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Will Explode!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAAAH!! It's SO Dark!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami, save me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ZEUS!! I'm coming!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Saul!! Can you make it to the library?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Weez... Weez... of course I can!!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Robin, you must be worried sick!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All that history was left to us by Ohara...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Devour the Library, Dream Demon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't give them even the faintest glimmer of hope!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: RoARR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A new world can only be born by severity things like history!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: NAM!!! Leave ZEUS to me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He'll Cough him right up after a strike from my FIST!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WOAAH!!! is that a fishman?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They really are the most repulsive race in the world!! If anyone's going to gag, it'll be me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Good thing I brought my mask!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That elitist attitude and gross ideology...

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: It's typical for a celestial dragon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Suuu- Perr!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: My jumping power is unreal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: All my muscles are raring to go!!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: With this boost, any monster...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that crosses me is gonna be cryin' for mercy after just one hit!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You really must be out of touch if you even don't recognize a former warlord like jinbe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, how're you gonna pay for insulting a member of our crew???

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about I kick a hole in that precious mask of yours?!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Superrar stirring...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Fishman Karate Secret technique!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: IFRIT JAMBE!!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
